_schema.description: Configuration for the Ghost CMS integration. The static site reads this file (via assets/js/ghost-blog-loader.js) to fetch recent posts from your Ghost instance using the Content API. The Content API key is a PUBLIC, read-only key — safe to commit to the repo. See GHOST-SETUP.md for instructions on generating it.

fields.apiUrl: Base URL of your Ghost site (no trailing slash). e.g. 'https://blog.avanasurgical.com'.
fields.contentApiKey: 26-character public Content API key. Generate via Ghost Admin → Integrations → Add custom integration. SAFE to commit; it is read-only.
fields.postsPerPage: How many posts to fetch for the homepage 'Latest from Our Blog' grid (default 3).
fields.blogUrl: URL the 'View All Posts' button + nav links go to. Usually same as apiUrl.
fields.enabled: Set false to keep the existing static placeholder cards (useful before Ghost is live).
